3074214.title: SpongeBob
3074214.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3074290.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3074290.description: Miguel is so messy that a creature named the Loch Mess Monster moves in with him. // Felicity and Miguel pretend to be real super heroes, drawing the wrath of a notorious super villain named The Couch Potato.

3074346.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3074346.description: Felicity and friends find a magic wand, which they use to make crazy wishes until they can locate the wand's rightful owner. // When Miguel discovers his favorite malt is now on the kids menu, he drinks from The Fountain of Youth to get younger.

3074418.title: Dorg van Dango
3074418.description: Jet thinks he's losing his cool, so he casts a spell and ends up an ice-cold villain! It's on Dorg and the gang to warm Jet's heart and save Normill! // The gang resurrects town founder Bertram Bumberback to help Dorg write a paper!

3074934.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3074934.description: The Penguins are faced with a World Domination battle when Private accidentally unleashes KuchiKukhan the Destroyer of Worlds. Can they stop him in time to save the World?

3074983.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3074983.description: Fred the Squirrel has hit the jackpot.  He stumbles onto a jackpot oak tree which is loaded with acorns (that's tons of money to animal folk). // When a Baby Fossa is delivered to the Zoo everyone is excited except for King Julien.

3075046.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3075046.description: When Shredder schemes to create a fearsome army of mutants, the Turtles have no choice but to rely on the help of the newest recruit to the Foot Clan: The Pulverizer!

3075090.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3075090.description: After Leonardo, Raphael, and Donatello fall under the control of a parasitic Wasp, Michelangelo must fight his brothers to save them.

3075143.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3075143.description: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad's life was like an action movie. // Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

3075691.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3075691.description: Timmy wishes up 5000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Cosmo and Wanda.

3075730.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3075730.description: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities.

3075754.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3075754.description: Anxious to give Dave a much-needed rest, Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap. Problem is, the house guests show up early while Dave is still home.

3075785.title: SpongeBob
3075785.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3075826.title: SpongeBob
3075826.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3075879.title: SpongeBob
3075879.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3076600.title: SpongeBob
3076600.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3076667.title: SpongeBob
3076667.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3076725.title: SpongeBob
3076725.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3077444.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3077444.description: It's Jeanette's birthday but she doesn't want to celebrate it, since she no longer believes in the magic of this special day. So the Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer her a magical, fairy-tale birthday she will ever forget.

3077457.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3077457.description: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers! Alvin panics! Their 'bro zone' has been invaded!

3077484.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3077484.description: When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit! Soon Theodore, (now Lil T), is offered a solo career and has to decide between family and fame as a solo artist.

3077536.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3077536.description: The penguins are on a mission to fulfill wishes. Private tells Mort that if he throws a penny in the fountain his wish will come true. // King Julien has just discovered April Fools Day. Making up for lost time, he terrorizes the zoo with pranks.

3077625.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3077625.description: The toy manufacturer of Rico's doll-girlfriend has upgraded their doll line with a voice chip. // When the penguins are photographed while in action and placed on the new zoo poster they have to stop the presses before the poster gets out.

3077673.title: Huize Herrie
3077673.description: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their "baby"sitter.

3078464.title: Huize Herrie
3078464.description: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

3078539.title: De Casagrandes
3078539.description: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. // When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

3078596.title: De Casagrandes
3078596.description: Adelaide and Carl have an adventure on Mr. Chang's route, but can they work together to save the day? // When Mama Lupe comes to visit, Abuela tries to get her family at the top of their cultural game.

3079138.title: SpongeBob
3079138.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3079219.title: SpongeBob
3079219.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3079248.title: SpongeBob
3079248.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelscahp van vrienden en zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3079311.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3079311.description: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

3079371.title: Dorg van Dango
3079371.description: Dorg is sick. The Magicals become microscopic to help fight the cold! // The new art teacher decides Dorg's a troublemaker, the gang will do anything to get back in the teacher's good books and win a prize at Art Day!

3079907.title: Sanjay & Craig
3079907.description: The dudes go undercover with Tufflips to investigate a crime ring that's pirating action hero's movies. // Sanjay and Craig go on a quest to find the top of a lawyer's head from a roadside billboard advertisement.

3079986.title: Sanjay & Craig
3079986.description: Sanjay and Craig take celebrity 'foodie' Anthony Gourmand on a Lundgren eating adventure. // Sanjay and Craig are thrilled to win a tour through Tufflips' movie-themed labyrinth, but soon realize there may be no escape.

3080061.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3080061.description: The lemurs argue, and Maurice and Mort move out of the habitat. Lonely Julien starts bugging the penguins, who decide they must get the lemurs back together. / A tiny frog with a nasty attitude moves to the zoo and starts terrorizing the animals.

3080548.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3080548.description: When the vet rounds up the penguins to give them a shot, Skipper's fear of needles takes over and he goes on the run.

3080565.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3080565.description: Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School (who's shaped like a triangle) while participating in the Spellementary School play, 'Mr. Cookie's Happy Day'.

3080647.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3080647.description: The team faces Stockman-Fly's new insect minions, and Raph has to man up to overcome his fear of insects and lead the team.

3080704.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3080704.description: Mikey befriends two odd new Superheroes, Wingnut and Screwloose!

3080744.title: Ollie's Pack
3080744.description: When monster bounty hunter, Ashlor shows up looking for Ollie and his pals, they hide out with Rance. // Ollie finds himself on trial, in monster court for misusing the pack.

3081347.title: SpongeBob
3081347.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelscahp van vrienden en zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3081414.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3081414.description: When Shifu's con-man father comes back into town, Po finds himself in the middle.

3081472.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3081472.description: Po is excited when he discovers a kung fu prodigy, but starts to worry when people seem to prefer the new kid to their beloved Dragon Warrior.

3082024.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3082024.description: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. So, with the help of Theodore and a VERY reluctant Simon, Alvin sets about proving it.

3082068.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3082068.description: Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave because he has tickets to the big soccer match.

3082089.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3082089.description: When Dave gets a parenting APP to help supervise The Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control.

3082111.title: SpongeBob
3082111.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3082195.title: SpongeBob
3082195.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3082248.title: De Casagrandes
3082248.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid are pumped up for their sleepover, but Carl and Adelaide might ruin the day! // After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

3082832.title: The Loud House
3082832.description: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln's fortune and claims his day will 'end in disaster', Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

3082884.title: Huize Herrie
3082884.description: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero.

3082931.title: Hier is Pony
3082931.description: Pony becomes a video game master, but when their friends are in danger Annie and Pony need to use their gaming skills to save them. // When Pony thinks he turned into a unicorn, Annie uses him to raise money to save their sports court from closing.

3082991.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3082991.description: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. So, with the help of Theodore and a VERY reluctant Simon, Alvin sets about proving it.

3083606.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3083606.description: Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave because he has tickets to the big soccer match.

3083635.title: SpongeBob
3083635.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3083703.title: SpongeBob
3083703.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3083787.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3083787.description: While breaking into the hostile environment of TCRI headquarters, the Turtles discover the true intent of the Kraang and resolve to stop the alien invasion once and for all.

3084275.title: Huize Herrie
3084275.description: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

3084340.title: The Loud House
3084340.description: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl, but when the sisters catch him he has to avoid them. // Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family. She seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

3084417.title: De Casagrandes
3084417.description: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he's their mama! // Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck... at the Yoon Kwon concert!

3084495.title: SpongeBob
3084495.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3085239.title: SpongeBob
3085239.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3085304.title: Avatar
3085304.description: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

3085386.title: Avatar
3085386.description: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

3086108.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3086108.description: Timmy wishes that his Mom could sell a house to anyone. // Someone's kidnapped Big Daddy! With the big mob boss missing, Wanda is called in to run the family business.

3086176.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3086176.description: Chloe joins the Squirrely Scouts and saves the troop by helping them get their first merit badge.

3086192.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3086192.description: Po's visit to a famous war hero goes awry when he finds out the retired general is off his rocker.

3086257.title: Ollie's Pack
3086257.description: Bernie pleads with Ollie and Cleo to let him keep a gross doglike monster they are intending to pack. // When Ashlor traps Ollie, Bernie, Cleo and Wowski, Ollie figures out how to escape to the Dark Cube.

3086755.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3086755.description: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her party. But Jeanette is so shy, she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows ALVIN. But his advice embarrasses Brittany to the point where she decides not to invite Jeanette to her party.

3086796.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3086796.description: Needing to find a part time job in order to buy the latest video game, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's baby-sitting job. But Basil is not too thrilled at having Alvin look after him. So he decides to put Alvin through the wringer!

3086821.title: Huize Herrie
3086821.description: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

3086884.title: De Casagrandes
3086884.description: The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties. // Carl gets lost in the city zoo after sneaking away from his family, in search of Keyon, the Komodo dragon.

3086953.title: SpongeBob
3086953.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.
